name: Broccoli & Blue Cheese in Prepared Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
2. Beat eggs until light. Mix in both cheeses, pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Stir in broccoli. Set aside.
4. Roll out pastry large enough to fit into a 9 inch deep dish quiche.
5. Pour filling into crust. Bake for 30 minutes.
